tools.Name: Free Claude Code
tools.Description: A lightweight proxy that allows using Claude Code CLI & VSCode extension without an Anthropic API key by routing requests through various free or local providers.
tools.Use_Case: Developers who want to use advanced AI coding assistants without paying for an Anthropic API subscription.

tools.Name: HackingTool
tools.Description: An all-in-one hacking tool for security researchers and penetration testers featuring 185+ tools across 20+ categories.
tools.Use_Case: Security professionals and ethical hackers performing reconnaissance, web attacks, or forensic analysis.

tools.Name: LangExtract
tools.Description: A Python library for extracting structured information from unstructured text using LLMs, with precise source grounding and interactive visualization.
tools.Use_Case: Processing large documents like clinical reports to extract structured data while maintaining traceability back to the source text.
